vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on harmonic drive due to insufficient heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Increase heatsink size or add additional cooling fins.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief at cable entry points.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief clamps and ensure proper bend radius.

risk.desc: Service access may be limited if hatch is not properly designed for easy removal.
risk.mit: Ensure hatch design allows for quick and tool-free removal.

risk.desc: Insufficient structural integrity if base plate thickness is not adequate.
risk.mit: Review and adjust base plate thickness based on load calculations.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear alignment marks.
risk.mit: Add alignment marks and visual guides for assembly.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

physics_paths.description: Payload force transmitted through arm links to base joint.
Rotational motion from motor to joint axis.
Heat dissipation from motor to ambient air via heatsink.

verification_focus.description: Ensure total mass does not exceed 1500g.
Verify joint can handle 100Nm peak torque.
Check heatsink can dissipate 50W of heat.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to material mismatch between aluminum and steel components.
risk.mit: Use compatible materials or design with thermal expansion gaps.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage during full rotation range if harness management is not optimized.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief and slack loops for cables.

risk.desc: LPBF process may introduce porosity affecting structural integrity.
risk.mit: Conduct post-processing treatments like HIP to reduce porosity.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance in critical interfaces could lead to binding or jamming.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearances to ensure smooth operation.

risk.desc: Inadequate support structures in LPBF may cause distortion in overhang areas.
risk.mit: Optimize support structure placement and orientation.
